notes: This artifact inventories RNG and list-order consumers that are currently represented by Python fixtures, logged scalar values, or annotations.
It is intentionally not a proof of original replay. Every consumer remains original_replay_complete=false until the shared Game RNG stream, list ordering, and side effects are replayed end-to-end.
Counts separate recorded scalar fixture values, inferred/unlogged scalar consumers, and shuffle calls because list shuffle helpers may consume multiple random values internally.

rng_consumers.evidence: remaster_dungeon_seed.json records the shuffled board-coordinate order before wall decisions and fixture-derived Utility.Shuffle index draws that replay that order.
rng_consumers.next_action: Recover the original list shuffle helper and replay tile order from the shared Game RNG stream.

shuffle_boundary.rng_api: Python random.shuffle fixture for recovered list-shuffle boundary

fixture_index_draws.algorithm: for i in 0..Count-1: j = RandomRange(i, Count-1); swap(i, j)

rng_consumers.evidence: remaster_dungeon_seed.json records one roll per shuffled board tile in maze.decision_log.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replace Python random values with original System.Random/Game.RandomFloat replay and original tile order.

rng_consumers.evidence: monster_levels.weights records rng.random()+0.5 fixture values for each base level bucket.
rng_consumers.next_action: Record raw values and replay the original weighting, truncation, fill, and level-sum correction path.

rng_consumers.evidence: remaster_dungeon_seed.json records one jitter roll per generated monster level plus any level-sum correction index rolls.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replay original adjustment thresholds and level-sum correction from the shared Game RNG stream.

rng_consumers.evidence: rewards.health_branch_roll records the fixture roll that selected the health reward branch.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replay the health-branch RandomFloat from the same original stream as reward count/name generation.

rng_consumers.evidence: rewards.health_count_roll records the branch-specific inclusive RandomRange result.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replay the branch-specific HealthPack count against original RNG.

rng_consumers.evidence: rewards.service_roll records the fixture roll for the service reward table.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replay service reward selection from the original Game.RandomFloat stream.

rng_consumers.evidence: rewards.additional_random_reward_count_roll records the inclusive RandomRange(2,4) result before GenerateRewardByName calls.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replay RandomRange(2,4) from the original reward RNG stream.

rng_consumers.evidence: rewards.additional_random_reward_rolls records each reward-name roll and depth-specific probability table match.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replay each reward-name RandomFloat against the original depth-specific probability table.

rng_consumers.evidence: rewards.final_shuffle_boundary records GenerateRewards input/output reward order plus fixture-derived Utility.Shuffle index draws; original RNG-sourced index draws remain unavailable.
rng_consumers.next_action: Replace Python random.shuffle with the recovered original shuffle helper and record index draws.

rng_consumers.evidence: Seed reward feature creation annotates TreasureChest loot rules, while treasure_chest_loot_smoke validates separate deterministic fixtures.
rng_consumers.next_action: Integrate item-count, card/gold branch, RewardTier, RandomGoldByTier, CardFinder roll, SpawnCard mutation, and final loot shuffle into the same floor RNG stream.

rng_consumers.evidence: cardfinder_reward_smoke verifies all roll-band boundaries over the current candidate pool but does not consume the floor RNG stream.
rng_consumers.next_action: Consume CardFinder rolls inside TreasureChest/SpawnCard replay with real current-user state and maxSpawns mutation.

rng_consumers.evidence: cardfinder_spawn_sequence_smoke re-runs CardFinder after SpawnCard-style mutation for two target rolls.
rng_consumers.next_action: Apply SpawnCard mutation after every generated reward card in a full floor replay.
